title: ShieldStatus Mod
description: This mod adds a simple color indicator — green when your shield is active, red when it’s disabled or recharging. Perfect for PvP and survival players who want better combat awareness without clutter.
body:
## ShieldStatus:
Always know when your shield is ready!
This mod adds a simple color indicator — green when your shield is active, red when it’s disabled or recharging. Perfect for PvP and survival players who want better combat awareness without clutter.

Made for my yt: https://www.youtube.com/@lluurii11

Videos of mod:
